HarmonicConstituents.name: M2
HarmonicConstituents.comments: Source of constituents: Mean of 5 1-year LSQHAs (2019-2023).  Sa and Ssa are from the mean of 22 annual LSQHA (1999, 2001-2002,2005-2023).  MM, MSF, MF are set to 0 due to instability.
